en_definition: a person who is intelligent or artistic or has a high level of skill, especially in one area
to give a loud, high cry because you are hurt, frightened, excited, etc.
a university teacher of the highest rank
the quality of thinking and behaving in a sensible, adult manner
a person who makes sculptures
a style and movement in early 20th century art in which objects and people are represented as geometric shapes
to start an organization or an institution, especially by providing money
a flat shape with three straight sides and three angles
causing a lot of angry public discussion and disagreement
to express praise for somebody or something because you approve of them or it
to show your approval of somebody / something by clapping your hands
to write music
a long, complicated piece of music for a large orchestra
very successful
very intelligent or skillful
excellent; of very good quality
belonging to a family of high social rank
connected with or belonging to the king or queen of a country
the quality of being pleasing to the senses or to the mind
the amount of something that a person, a machine or an organization produces
a dramatic work in which most of the words are sung to music
the action of spending a lot of time or energy on something
a person whose job is to make men's clothes
a person who works in another person’s house and cooks or cleans for them
money available to a person, an organization or a country; the way this money is managed
an idea or a picture in your imagination
a dream or similar experience
a ceremony for burying a dead person
a place in the ground where a dead person is buried
connected with money and finance
the act of expressing disapproval of somebody or something
slowly, over a long period of time
very impressive; very beautiful
large in amount, value or importance
a quality that something has
the parts of a building that remain after it has been destroyed or severely damaged
to damage something so badly that it loses its value, pleasure, etc.; to spoil something
an area of tropical forest where trees and plants grow very thickly
a product of your imagination
a pleasant situation that you imagine but is unlikely to happen
material made by preserving animal skins
sensible and realistic
the state of feeling safe from danger or worry
easy to do or to understand; not complicated
a strong feeling such as love, fear or anger
a large and important unit or section of an organization
to try to be more successful or better than somebody else
a group of people or things with particular features in common
the fact of somebody / something not existing or not being available; a lack of something
the fact of somebody being away from a place where they are usually expected to be
unusual or surprising in a way that causes people to take notice
zh_definition: 非凡的；显著的；引人注目的

en_definition: a person who steals from a person or place, often using violence or threats
the particular way in which somebody chooses to perform a piece of music or role
a film, book or play that is based on a particular piece of work but has been changed
based on an assessment of the values, qualities, and significance of a person or thing
to say that something is not true
preferred by most people
having a quality that makes something different and easily noticed
private and secret; not shown to other people
special importance that is given to something
made of many different things or parts that are connected; difficult to understand
very typical of something or somebody's character
a date that is an exact number of years after the date of an important event
interesting and unusual enough to attract attention
a number of pieces of paper for writing or drawing on that are fastened together at one edge
the process of solving a problem by trying various methods until you find one that is successful
